title: Personal Blog Platform
description: A fast, accessible blog built with modern web technologies. Features server-side rendering, Markdown support, and optimized images.

title: Task Manager Application
description: A responsive task manager with local persistence, keyboard shortcuts, and real-time updates. Built with React and modern UI patterns.

title: E-Commerce Landing Page
description: A performant, SEO-friendly landing page with conversion optimization and analytics integration. Perfect for product launches.

title: SaaS Dashboard
description: A comprehensive admin dashboard with data visualization, user management, and real-time metrics. Built with React and D3.js.

title: Mobile App UI
description: Beautiful mobile app designs for iOS and Android with responsive layouts and accessibility features.

title: Data Analytics Tool
description: Interactive data visualization tool with real-time updates, custom reports, and machine learning predictions.
